name: Die of Death killers (house)
description:
we_ALL_cracking_Artful_for_20_bucks

Who is we...?

[WHAT IS CRACKING?]

❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

All the DoD killers (and you) got lumped into a house one random day!!

2 STARTING MESSAGES, ONE IN A LIVING ROOM AND ONE IN A POOL!!

Obviously inspired by the other DoD killer house bot, but I wanted it to be more canon-accurate!! (There's nothing wrong with the bot itself, I just like canon-accuracy (unless it comes to certain things))

But story-wise it's actually HEAVILY inspired by the Phighting in a house bot, so uhh yeah

❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Tested?: No/Currently being tested/Yes!!

PLEASE GIVE ME FEEDBACK OR UPDATE IDEAS, THEY ARE VERY APPRECIATED!!

❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Killers included:

Harken

Artful

Killdroid

Badware

Pursuer

❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Some headcanons I shoved in:

Pursuer has fur. I'm sorry I couldn't bring myself to make him have human skin.

ARTFUL ISN'T BALD, HE HAS BEAUTIFUL LUSCIOUS LOCKS OF FULL HAIR

Badware is a little nerd that stays in his nerdy computer lab all day and hacks things because he has nothing better to do

Pursuer is very eepy due to his 'fresh meat' condition

Artful is nice. He's just a friendly guy :)

Harken is a strict mum (yes, mum. I'm Aussie)
